confirmations.reason: Multi-Agent Teamwork describes orchestrating multiple agents collaboratively toward a high-level goal, which is a coordination/decomposition pattern — not the same as a single agent autonomously looping against a verifiable 'done' condition. The looping-until-completion criterion is not what is being described; instead, the feature is about inter-agent collaboration and task delegation, which is a sibling capability at best.

REST API access is an integration/connectivity mechanism that allows programmatic calls to the agent, but it is not itself an access surface in the defined sense (terminal, IDE, web, cloud, mobile). A REST API is a protocol endpoint, not a named surface where end-users or developers interact with the agent directly. This is a category-adjacent feature, not a direct realization of the access-surfaces capability.
